description_long: This lamp features a symmetrical, double-globe design with two frosted glass spheres mounted horizontally on either end of a metallic crossbar. The central support is a vertically oriented, metallic rod with decorative ribbing and a spiral, ornate base that adds a touch of elegance. The base is wide and circular, providing stability and a classic look, while the crossbar is sleek and minimalistic. The frosted globes diffuse light softly, making the lamp suitable for ambient urban lighting. The metallic finish is likely brushed or polished, giving it a modern yet timeless appearance. This lamp would be well-suited for placement on tables or desks in public or semi-public urban environments such as libraries, lobbies, or cafes.
description: A double-globe lamp with a metallic crossbar and ornate spiral base, featuring two frosted glass spheres for diffused lighting. The design is both modern and decorative, ideal for tabletop use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both frosted glass globes on either side of the metallic crossbar and the ornate spiral base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the alignment of the two globes, one behind the other, and the detailed ribbing on the central support.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying both globes and the decorative base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the globes aligned vertically and the ribbed central support.
